title: guenthera repanda subsp. blancoana
intro: Guenthera repanda subsp. blancoana, also known as Guenthera blancoana, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its ability to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Guenthera repanda subsp. blancoana are said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as an infusion, or it may be combined with other herbs in a decoction to create a medicinal tea.
